title: Anomocarpus
taxonomy: Anomocarpus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rutaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the citrus or rue family. The Rutaceae family is part of the order Sapindales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. This classification places Anomocarpus within the larger group of plants that also includes citrus fruits and rue. Anomocarpus is native to Australia, where it is found in the eastern regions of the country. The genus is characterized by its small, yellow flowers and small, red or yellow fruit.
